entities.name: Proof-of-Work (Hiring)

entities.name: Traditional Hiring Signals
entities.context: Resumes and cover letters; becoming obsolete due to AI generation

entities.name: AI-Generated Applications

entities.name: ATS Keyword Matching
entities.context: Traditional hiring evaluation method that will face total collapse in quality

relationships.context: Core value proposition built on veracity through dynamic interaction
AI drives cost of generating quality signals to near zero
Signal inflation makes traditional signals obsolete
Dialogue serves as proof-of-work because it requires authentic real-time processing
Believes industry must move away from evaluating artifacts toward evaluating performance
